## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Motivation / Use Case
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Include example API usage if relevant.

# Example of how the feature might look/work

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
